/usr/bin/c++  -O4 -std=c++17 -Wall -g CMakeFiles/kmerTest.dir/src/murmur3Hash.cu.o CMakeFiles/kmerTest.dir/src/memTransfer.cu.o CMakeFiles/kmerTest.dir/src/gpuProperty.cu.o CMakeFiles/kmerTest.dir/src/twoBitCompressor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kmerTest.dir/src/kmer.cu.o CMakeFiles/kmerTest.dir/src/mash.cu.o CMakeFiles/kmerTest.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kmerTest.dir/src/newickHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kmerTest.dir/src/neighborJoining.cu.o -o kmerTest   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtbb.so.12.5 -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
